name: ADVENTUS SECUNDUS
description:
SET IN 2004 (SC-13)

IN A POST-APOCALYPTIC POST SECOND COMING OF HEAVEN ON A TNO-LIKE EARTH

ADVENTUS SECUNDUS

SECOND COMING

ALTERNATE UNIVERSE

Pre-Breakthrough Era (1945-1990)

1945: End of World War II - German victory in Europe, Japanese partial victory in Asia

1946: Second Phase of Lebensraum begins. Establishment of permanent Reichskommissariats and Reichsprotektorates across occupied Europe

1950-1952: West Russian War - Russian forces defeated, further collapse into smaller warlord states

1957: Death of Adolf , succession crisis and partial Bürgerkrieg (civil war). Speer-Goebbels bloc emerges victorious, swift dissolution of the SS

1958: Lebensraum officially halted after causing 68.3 million deaths total (44.8 million in first phase). Eastern Europe heavily Germanized

1960-1974: Reform period in the Greater Germanic Reich

1973: Death of Joseph Goebbels

1976: Death of Albert Speer, dissolution of the Greater Germanic Reich. All Reichskommissariats and Reichsprotektorates transition to independent Republiks. Germany's population reaches approximately 322 million out of 754 million total Europeans

1976-1982: Period of relative stability, independent European republics establish themselves

1982: Opening of the EDEN PROJECT - massive international collaboration between:

- Toronto Accord (USA-aligned nations)

- Einheitspakt (German sphere)

- ALVOB (Russian sphere - Siberia, small portions of European Russia, Central Asian aligned states)

- PRC

- Japanese sphere (Manchuria, Greater Mongolia, Taiwan, United Korea, Northern Chinese State Republic)

- Republic of Brazil

- Republic of Argentina

- African Socialist Republic (West United Africa + Northern Greater Congo area)

1985: First detection of "Heavenly Particles" by EDEN PROJECT researchers

1986: One of God's Ophanim captured by research team. Dies one month later from extensive testing. Small fragments of heavenly technology acquired

1987: THE HEAVENLY CONTACT

- Researchers successfully open portal to Eden

- Holy Heavenly Guards of Eden defend against human incursion

- 723 humans killed in the initial breach

- Portal sealed

- Several angels captured during incident (mostly regular angels, 3 Thrones, 1 Cherubim)

- Captured angels tortured and experimented upon by human scientists

- Most captured angels die from experimentation

1988 (December 3rd): By this point, humanity has opened the portal only two additional times, cautious of triggering "Heavenly Cascade" or "Heavenly Breakthrough." USA establishes independent scientific branch to develop separate portal technology

1990 (December 2nd): US branch conducts unauthorized incursion into Eden

- Several dozen special forces soldiers with armored equipment enter

- Multiple angels killed

- One Throne angel injured

- Entire human force wiped out shortly after

1990 (December 24th): THE SECOND COMING / THE HEAVENLY BREAKTHROUGH

- Heavenly Forces descend to Earth

- God no longer visible on His thr
creator: 7. OBERKOMMANDO
